channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Building Structured Inter-Agent Communication: A Practical Guide
item.description: Every multi-agent tutorial shows "Agent A talks to Agent B." None show how to keep that conversation reliable at scale. The Problem with String-Based Agent Chat # What most frameworks do: result =...

item.title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform, Start Here
item.description: Why clicking in consoles stops working Your first cloud resources come from clicking. You open the AWS console, click through a wizard, create a server. It works, and clicking feels productive....

item.title: Stop Letting AI Write Your Entire Component

item.title: This free Mac app reveals the truth about your mystery USB-C cables
item.description: Nearly three years ago, I showed you an awesome $8 cable tester that quickly tells you if your USB-C cable is likely fast, slow, powerful, or weak. Sadly, that gadget got discontinued, and I've...

item.title: Social media limits are coming for teens across Europe
item.description: The European Union is weighing sweeping new restrictions on children's and teenagers' access to social media, including age limits, an outright ban, and phased access. Social media platforms could...

item.title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
item.description: Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more. Of the four new...

item.title: Misconfigured Server Reveals Three Evilginx Phishing Operations Targeting Microsoft 365
item.description: An attacker running a live Microsoft 365 phishing operation left a Python web server listening on a public port with directory listing switched on. The command that did it: python3 -m http.server...

item.title: iCagenda and Balbooa Forms Joomla Flaws Reportedly Exploited as Zero-Days
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added two maximum-severity security flaws impacting iCagenda and Balbooa extensions for Joomla to its Known Exploited...

item.description: Lorde was performing at the Real Cool Festival in Madrid on Thursday and took some time during her set to speak out against AI glasses. While she didn't specify any brands in particular, it's...

item.title: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
item.description: Apple's self-driving car program never really got off the ground, but it may have been what made the company's chips the powerful AI performers they are. Early in the development of the...

item.title: One of SteelSeries’ best gaming headsets is over $100 off
item.description: SteelSeries has the Arctis Nova Pro Wireless gaming headset on sale for $239.99 (currently between $300 and $350 at other retailers). The Xbox version that supports a host of other platforms...

item.title: How Philips Hue got the smart home right
item.description: The state of the smart home can be frustrating, because it is just so obvious how things ought to work. You should be able to control everything from everywhere. Your spaces should adapt to what...

item.title: Less is more with the Oura Ring 5

item.title: Blue Prince became a bonding — and learning — experience for my family
item.description: I've always been the gamer in the family. When my son was born nearly 11 years ago, gaming was one of the things I looked forward to sharing with him. Pulling up a chair next to me, he would watch...

item.title: Scientists’ Side Hustle? Using AI and Quantum Computing to Generate New Peptides
item.description: Researchers cobbled together funding and time to show how quantum computing could aid in the development of drugs to help underserved populations and combat rare diseases.

item.title: Compromised jscrambler 8.14.0 npm Release Drops Rust Infostealer During Install
item.description: The jscrambler npm package was compromised, and simply installing its 8.14.0 release runs an infostealer on your machine. Published on July 11, 2026, the malicious version carries a preinstall...

item.title: Hackers Weaponize Balochistan Police Portal in Multi-Group Espionage Campaigns
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of sustained cyber espionage activity against several Pakistani law enforcement organizations undertaken by suspected China- and India-aligned...

item.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
item.description: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

item.title: Critical Zimbra Flaw Could Let Crafted Emails Run Malicious Code in User Sessions
item.description: Zimbra is urging customers to apply updates to address a critical security vulnerability impacting the Classic Web Client that could result in arbitrary code execution. The vulnerability has been...

item.title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
item.description: Johannes Heidecke’s departure comes as OpenAI tries to further integrate its research and safety teams.

item.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
